issue_title: Wrong top calculation for scroll ancestors with fixed position?
issue_body_preview:
Hi there, we're using the library to create a dnd experience between a scrollable fixed position div and a sortable ( scrollable ) drop zone. 
This mostly works well ( we're currently using PR #54 as our basis ) but causes our DragOverlay to appear in the wrong top position after scrolling the drop
test_description_zh: 在页面中创建一个包含可滚动内容的 fixed 定位容器，以及一个可排序的可滚动放置区域。从 fixed 定位的滚动容器中拖拽一个元素到可排序的放置区域，在拖拽过程中滚动放置区域，观察 DragOverlay 的位置是否跟随鼠标/指针正确显示。
expected_result_zh: 当从 fixed 定位的可滚动祖先容器中拖拽元素时，DragOverlay 的垂直位置（top）应始终与鼠标/指针位置保持一致，不会因为滚动操作而出现偏移或跳动，拖拽覆盖层应准确跟随拖拽手势。
